title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Anbu and Kanmani make a last-minute arrival for the grand finale. Kanmani suppresses her illness and assists Anbu throughout the grand finale cooking challenge.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Ilamathi presents evidence against Kalamma to convince Paraman that she murdered Ashok. Later, Kalamma stages a desperate drama to prove her innocence and regain his trust.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Vetri surprises Shanmugam's family with gifts and a feast. A jealous Shanmugam ruins the sweet with salt, causing an angry Abinaya to leave without eating.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Poongodi firmly confronts Manjamalai and demands he apologise to Pechi for punishing her. Mayandi commends Poongodi's bravery in standing up for her rights.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Bairavi files a complaint with Sanjay over the damage to her cultivated crop by cows. On learning that Arumugam is responsible, Sanjay starts collecting evidence against him.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: Thangaraj advises Suresh to use Mathi's vulnerable state to get closer to her. He fuels tensions by revealing Revathi's remarks about Lakshmi and Ragavan's cruelty towards Mathi.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Vigilance officers raid Pandian's house, leaving Senthil shaken and under scrutiny. Meanwhile, Muthuvel and Kathir discuss Senthil and Kumar's marriage during a drive.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
description: As the family excitedly prepares to buy a TV, lenders confront Nadesan over his loan. Nila then resolves the conflict by using the TV purchase savings to clear the dues.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
episodeTitle: A Testing Time for Meena and Muthu
description: Meena and Muthu are shocked by her pregnancy complications at the hospital. Meanwhile, Manoj rejoices as Devika agrees to give him the promised money.

title: Chinna Marumagal
description: Sethupathi is moved by baby Meenatchi's cries after her injection. He then distributes essential supplies to the public in Chennai as part of his political outreach.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Saranya creates a sweet moment for Arjun to apply Mehendi to Madhu, bringing him joy. Swetha confides in Arjun about her reluctance to accept the marriage as she still loves him.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Kandhasamy is shocked by Indhira's wine purchase, while Murugan helps free Sarasu's chain for Kumaran. Kandhasamy's family then visits the bride's house for Murugan's wedding.
